Venezuela’s interim president Delcy Rodríguez has appointed key cabinet members and met with U.S. envoy Laura Dogu in Caracas, marking a step toward restoring diplomatic relations with Washington and advancing discussions on transition, stabilization, and cooperation after the ouster of Nicolás Maduro.
